notes.introduction: An exposition of 2 Timothy 1:1-2 on the greeting Paul addresses to Timothy, examining Paul's acknowledgment of divine authority, God's will, and the sources of grace, mercy, and peace, alongside Paul's appreciation for ministry, physical life, and eternal life.

sections.heading: Introduction to 2 Timothy and Series Theme
The Pastoral Epistles and Paul's Relationship with Timothy
Paul Acknowledges the Authority of God
Paul Acknowledges God's Will for His Life
God as the Source of Grace, Mercy, and Peace
Paul's Appreciation for the Work of Ministry
Paul's Appreciation for Physical and Eternal Life
Assurance of Eternal Life and the Two Judgments
